allow:
Bash(python -c "
import sys, re
html = sys.stdin.read\(\)
# Find all PDF links
pdfs = re.findall\(r''href=""\([^""]+\\.pdf\)""'', html, re.IGNORECASE\)
for p in pdfs:
    print\(p\)
# Also find attachments
attachments = re.findall\(r''href=""\([^""]+\(?:投档|录取|普通类|征集|附件\)[^""]+\)""'', html\)
for a in attachments:
    print\(a\)
")
